race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Maiden
race.comment: STRATO KEN (2) has been in the money at his last two runs and the nose defeat at Hobart two back stands out. Found a place over 1100m at Launceston his latest and will go close with average luck from the outside gate. GEEGEES MERCEDES (8) is busting to in. Stuck on well last start to finish second over 1000m at Hobart after showing good early speed. Nicely placed to go one better. DINA TYCOON (3) has switched from a Flemington yard and has her first run for the Jessie Bazan yard. Raced well enough fresh on the Ballarat synthetic two starts ago and has prepared for this with an effortless trial win. Definite chance. HEART OF PARIS (5) is lightly raced and resumes with definite claims after a solid recent trial.
